description: You are a civil/survey engineering team lead at an engineering consultancy in Colorado Springs, El Paso County, Colorado. A subdivision developer requires a comprehensive site analysis package for a proposed residential development. Using TopoCal, generate the terrain models, contours, volume computations, and profiles specified in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ElPasoSite\AnalysisSpec.txt using the survey data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ElPasoSite\elpaso_survey.csv. Export the survey points and contour lines to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ElPasoSite\SiteAnalysis_ElPaso.dxf and save a written analysis report containing elevation statistics, earthwork volumes, profile summary, and a development suitability assessment to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ElPasoSite\SiteAnalysis.txt.

metadata.location: El Paso County, Colorado (Colorado Springs area)
metadata.anti_gaming_note: Max partial credit = 54 (8+8+18+20) which is below pass threshold 60
